from .observability import setup_logfire, setup_observability
from .tools.memory import memory

async def lifespan():
    setup_logfire(service_name='syntx-memory', service_version='0.2.0')
    setup_observability(service_name='syntx-memory', service_version='0.2.0')

def setup_observability(service_name: str, service_version: str) -> None:
    pass

document.feature_description: Add Logfire instrumentation to memory store and graph query operations.

codebase_map.description: Stores and manages persistent memory records.

open_violations.description: Memory writes are not traced end to end.

prior_decisions.title: Prefer redacted observability metadata
prior_decisions.rationale: Do not send raw prompts or graph payloads to external observability backends.

decisions.title: Prefer redacted observability metadata
decisions.rationale: Do not send raw prompts or graph payloads to external observability backends.
